summary: Bulk Team Onboarding & First-Login Profile Testing - Backend APIs 100% pass (11/11), Frontend UI renders correctly. Complete-profile page shows 4 steps correctly. Setup wizard step 1 renders with all fields.

minor.issue: Industry field not saved on store creation - StoreCreate model missing 'industry' field. Industry can only be set via PUT /api/admin/stores/{id}

integration_issues.issue: Wizard step progression from Step 1 (Org & Store) to Step 2 (Branding) fails because org/store creation API requires X-User-ID header which may not be sent correctly after login. Same issue as iteration_118.

verified_elements: 7-step progress bar (Organization, Branding, Team, Reviews, Templates, Tags, Handoff)
Success indicator with temp password after creation
Team Credentials table showing name, email, temp password, role
Remaining Items section for incomplete tasks

verified_steps: Step 1 of 4: Add Your Headshot - Photo upload area, tip box, Skip button, Continue button
Step 2 of 4: Your Details - Job Title input, Bio textarea (code review)
Step 3 of 4: Social Links - Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn inputs (code review)
Step 4 of 4: Set Your Password - Current password, New password, Confirm password inputs, Let's Go! button (code review)

login_redirect_logic.description: Login checks if user.onboarding_complete === false AND role !== 'super_admin', then redirects to /auth/complete-profile

verified_features: Backend: POST /api/admin/users creates user with onboarding_complete=false and needs_password_change=true when those fields are sent
Backend: POST /api/admin/users defaults onboarding_complete=true when not specified
Backend: POST /api/admin/stores creates store correctly (industry needs separate PUT)
Backend: PUT /api/profile/{user_id} accepts and saves title, bio, social_instagram, social_facebook, social_linkedin, onboarding_complete
Backend: POST /api/auth/change-password changes password correctly and clears needs_password_change flag
Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns onboarding_complete field in user response
Frontend Wizard: Step 1 (Org & Store) renders with form fields for org name, store name, industry picker, phone, website, city, state
Frontend Wizard: Step 3 (Team Roster) has code for bulk team member creation with name, email, phone, role fields
Frontend Wizard: Step 7 (Handoff) has code for credential table and configuration checklist
Frontend Complete Profile: /auth/complete-profile renders with 4 steps - photo upload, title/bio, social links, password
Frontend Login: Lines 183-195 check for onboarding_complete and redirect non-super_admins to /auth/complete-profile
action_items: INVESTIGATE: Frontend X-User-ID header not being sent correctly after login to wizard page. The api.ts interceptor gets user from AsyncStorage but login may not be setting it properly for wizard page. This was also noted in iteration_118.
OPTIONAL: Add 'industry' field to StoreCreate model in backend/models.py to allow setting industry on store creation
NOTE: To fully test the login redirect flow, create a user with onboarding_complete=false via API, then login as that user in a clean browser session
critical_code_review_comments: setup-wizard.tsx correctly sends onboarding_complete=false and needs_password_change=true when creating users (line 257-258)
setup-wizard.tsx correctly implements bulk team roster with dynamic user count button (lines 619-622)
complete-profile.tsx correctly sends onboarding_complete=true when finishing onboarding (line 123)
login.tsx correctly checks onboarding_complete===false for non-super_admin users (lines 189-192)
Backend admin.py correctly handles onboarding_complete and needs_password_change in user creation (lines 681-682)
Backend profile.py correctly allows updating onboarding_complete field (lines 108-110)
Backend auth.py change-password endpoint correctly clears needs_password_change flag (lines 476-480)

success_rate.frontend: 90% - UI fully functional, API integration needs user session fix (same as iteration_118)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create and cleanup TEST_* prefixed users, orgs, stores
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk team onboarding APIs fully tested and working. The new setup wizard step 3 (Team Roster) allows creating multiple team members at once with onboarding_complete=false and needs_password_change=true. The new /auth/complete-profile page guides first-login users through 4 steps: photo, title/bio, social links, and password. Login correctly checks for onboarding_complete flag and redirects non-super_admins to complete-profile. The X-User-ID header issue from iteration_118 still affects wizard API calls.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - not testing actual SMS sending
